narrative:
Huber Heights 5-B (precinct in Montgomery County) has 1,155 registered voters, with 66.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.5%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.2 percentage points.
